# Scripts

Parent: [Moonshine Tauri](../README.md)

Operational scripts and automation helpers for the Scripts workflow.

## Key Files

- `mobile-bridge.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `mobile-bridge.test.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `moonshine-skymesh-bridge.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `moonshine-skymesh-bridge.test.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `patch-android-build-task.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `patch-android-icons.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `patch-ios-signing.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.
- `prepare-sidecars.mjs`: Script or runtime helper.

## Usage

Use this README as the local map for this directory. Keep implementation details near the owning source files, and update this document when the directory contract changes.

## Verification

Run the closest package or app-level check through the repository-owned `a0` or `monster` target after changing behavior in this directory.
